title: Low Income Home Water Assistance Program comments due
summary: Kenaitze Indian Tribe will host a public meeting from 1 to 2 p.m. on July 26, 2021, to receive public comments on the Tribe’s Low Income Home Water Assistance Program. Grant information is available in advance at the Tribe’s Na’ini Social and Family Services office, 1001 Mission Ave. Ste. B, Kenai,...

title: Summer of STEM
summary: Summer of STEM During the pandemic, the REAP STEM Education team eagerly awaited the return to in-person outreach. This summer, our patience was rewarded! In-Person Classroom Visits Starting in April, the STEM team began reconnecting with students in the classroom again.
